name: Lloyd AI Group — Marketing Foundation
description: Build a professional marketing presence for Lloyd AI Group that generates credibility and inbound interest — starting with brand identity, website with lead-gen questionnaire, and LinkedIn outreach before any paid advertising.

todos.task: Define brand positioning: finalize one-liner, target niches, and tone of voice
Design a simple logo and choose brand colors + typography (Canva or Looka)
Choose website platform (Framer, Webflow, or Carrd) and set up domain
Write all website copy — homepage, services, about, and CTA sections
Build the AI Readiness Questionnaire (lead-gen form for business owners)
Integrate Calendly booking link for free Audit calls
Launch website and test all forms, links, and booking flow
Optimize LinkedIn profile — headline, banner, about section, featured link to website
Write 3 foundational LinkedIn posts establishing expertise and social proof
Build a list of 50 target prospects in Carmel/Indianapolis (real estate, professional services, local service businesses)
Write 3 personalized LinkedIn outreach message templates (connection request, follow-up, audit offer)
Set up free CRM (HubSpot free tier) to track leads from questionnaire and outreach
Write 3-email follow-up sequence for questionnaire leads
Book and conduct first 3 Audit calls, document objections and common pain points
